title: wrightia tokiae
intro: Wrightia tokiae, also known as Tokia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Wrightia tokiae include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
